message:
fix(net): reject cancel_job and poll_status after shutdown in WorkerCoordinator

cancel_job() and poll_status() did not check shutdown_requested before
mutating job state or enqueuing messages. After a shutdown request, these
operations should fail cleanly rather than enqueue messages that will
never be delivered.

Add early shutdown_requested guards returning ShutdownInProgress on both
methods. Tests verify job state is not mutated and the error is returned.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
